title: caralluma × anemoniflora
intro: Caralluma × anemoniflora, also known as a hybrid between Caralluma adscendens and Caralluma fimbriifolia, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic effects. The health benefits of Caralluma × anemoniflora include weight loss, improved glucose metabolism, and reduced inflammation, making it a potential herbal remedy for managing obesity and related health issues. Herbal preparations of Caralluma × anemoniflora include extracts, capsules, and teas, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
